mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_subscription ( id, user_id, service_type, subscription_type, subscription_status, pay_order_id, effective_time, expire_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{serviceType}, #{subscriptionType}, #{subscriptionStatus}, #{payOrderId}, #{effectiveTime}, #{expireTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_subscription SET user_id = #{userId}, service_type = #{serviceType}, subscription_type = #{subscriptionType}, subscription_status = #{subscriptionStatus}, pay_order_id = #{payOrderId}, effective_time = #{effectiveTime}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, service_type, subscription_type, subscription_status, pay_order_id, effective_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time, remark FROM user_subscription WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, service_type, subscription_type, subscription_status, pay_order_id, effective_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time, remark FROM user_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, service_type, subscription_type, subscription_status, pay_order_id, effective_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time, remark FROM user_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND service_type = #{serviceType} AND subscription_status = 1 -- 1=生效中 AND expire_time > NOW() -- 未过期 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1 -- 取最新的有效订阅
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_subscription SET subscription_status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
